content: contact(message="Hey Adrian, I've been thinking a lot about our conversations and wanted to suggest a coffee talk. Would you be up for meeting up sometime soon? I'd really value the chance to chat more.", to="Adrian Morales")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Coffee Talk with Adrian Morales", message="Hey Adrian, I've been thinking about our conversations and wanted to suggest a coffee talk. Would you be up for meeting up sometime soon? I'd really value the chance to chat more.", proposal="I'd like to have a coffee talk with you to discuss our thoughts on identity and privilege. I think it would be a great opportunity to connect and share ideas.", invited_persons=["Adrian Morales"], time="Y2020-W08-activity-D3", location="Corner Coffee Shop", required_participants=["Adrian Morales"])

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Coffee and Conversation", message="Hey Adrian Morales, how about we grab coffee sometime? I've wanted to chat more about your play and maybe get some ideas for my own writing.", proposal="I thought we could meet at the Corner Coffee Shop on D2. It's a quiet spot and I'd love to hear more about your work.", invited_persons=["Adrian Morales"], time="Y2020-W10-activity-D2", location="Corner Coffee Shop", required_participants=["Adrian Morales"])

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Coffee and Conversation", message="Hey Adrian Morales, I hope you're doing well. I wanted to check in and see if you're still interested in grabbing coffee sometime. I've been thinking about our conversations and how we could collaborate on some ideas for our respective projects. I'd really value your perspective, especially regarding your play.", proposal="I thought we could meet at the Corner Coffee Shop on D2. It's a quiet spot and I'd love to hear more about your work.", invited_persons=["Adrian Morales"], time="Y2020-W12-activity-D2", location="Corner Coffee Shop", required_participants=["Adrian Morales"])

contact(message="Hey Adrian, I've been thinking a lot lately about the idea of authenticity and how we build our own identities outside of inherited expectations. I wanted to ask if you'd be open to a conversation about it sometime soon. Maybe over coffee or a walk? Let me know what works for you.", to="Adrian Morales")
